category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates beautiful images of source code; official README describes Silicon as rendering source code into an image.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the display name Silicon.
docs_sources: No dedicated docs site found; official GitHub README contains installation, examples, usage, and configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Aloxaf/silicon; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official README describe a Rust CLI for rendering source code images with syntax/theme support.
